description_long: This is a yellow, A-frame caution sign made of plastic, commonly used in public spaces to indicate temporary hazards or closures. The front face displays a prominent black biohazard-like virus symbol inside a triangle, above a red and white label that reads 'TEMPORARILY CLOSED DUE TO COVID-19.' The sign features a built-in handle at the top for easy carrying and placement. Its structure consists of two flat panels joined at the top, forming a stable, self-supporting base. The surface is smooth with a matte finish, and the sign is lightweight and portable. The sign is designed to be highly visible and easily recognizable in urban environments such as sidewalks, building entrances, and public facilities.
description: A yellow, freestanding A-frame caution sign with a COVID-19 closure warning and virus symbol, made of plastic and featuring a carry handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the warning symbol, COVID-19 closure message, and handle cutout.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile and A-frame structure of the sign.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, with the same warning symbol and message.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin A-frame profile.
attribute_symbol: virus symbol inside triangle, text: 'TEMPORARILY CLOSED DUE TO COVID-19'
attribute_placement_location: sidewalk, building entrance, hallway, or public facility
